title: Document the FTestXRP escrow workflow
description: Create a concise technical note that explains and verifies the approve, createTask, acceptTask, submitWork, and approveTask flow used by FAsset TaskBounty on Flare Testnet Coston2.
deliverables: A Markdown technical note committed to the public project repository
The public Coston2 transaction hashes for each workflow step
Before-and-after FTestXRP balance evidence for creator, TaskBounty, and worker
acceptanceCriteria: The note correctly distinguishes allowance from token balance
The note explains which account signs each transaction
The recorded TaskBounty state and token balances match public RPC results
